title: taraxacum cescae
intro: Taraxacum cescae, also known as the lesser dandelion, is a perennial plant belonging to the dandelion genus. It is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Taraxacum cescae include reducing blood pressure, alleviating symptoms of arthritis and eczema, and supporting liver function. Taraxacum cescae can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
